definitions: A person who feels compelled to work excessively, including while at home.

definition: One who works: a person who performs labor for a living; traditionally, especially, manual labor.
definitions: One who works: a person who performs labor for a living; traditionally, especially, manual labor.

definitions: plural of worker

definition: Operation; action.
definitions: Operation; action.

definition: A man who labours for wages.
definitions: A man who labours for wages.

definition: The place where someone works.
definitions: The place where someone works.

definition: plural of work in its countable senses
definitions: plural of work in its countable senses

definition: A room, especially one which is not particularly large, used for manufacturing or other light industrial work.
definitions: A room, especially one which is not particularly large, used for manufacturing or other light industrial work.

definition: The subjective human experience, regarded collectively; human collective existence; existence in general; the reality we live in.
definitions: The subjective human experience, regarded collectively; human collective existence; existence in general; the reality we live in.

definition: Concerned with human or earthly matters, physical as opposed to spiritual.
definitions: Concerned with human or earthly matters, physical as opposed to spiritual.

definition: Spanning the world; global.
definitions: Spanning the world; global.

definition: A generally tubular invertebrate of the annelid phylum; an earthworm.
definitions: A generally tubular invertebrate of the annelid phylum; an earthworm.
More loosely, any of various tubular invertebrates resembling annelids but not closely related to them, such as velvet worms, acorn worms, flatworms, or roundworms. See Appendix:English worms.

definition: Damaged and shabby as a result of much use.
definitions: Damaged and shabby as a result of much use.
Worn out; exhausted.

definition: Thinking about unpleasant things that have happened or that might happen; feeling afraid and unhappy.
definitions: Thinking about unpleasant things that have happened or that might happen; feeling afraid and unhappy.

definitions: To be troubled; to give way to mental anxiety or doubt.

definition: Inducing worry.
definitions: Inducing worry.

definitions: comparative form of bad: more bad

definition: To make worse; to impair.
definitions: To make worse; to impair.

definition: The devotion accorded to a deity or to a sacred object.
definitions: The devotion accorded to a deity or to a sacred object.

definitions: Now chiefly as the second element in the names of plants: a plant used for food or medicine.

definitions: Having a value of; proper to be exchanged for.

definitions: Good and important enough to spend time, effort, or money on.

definitions: Having worth, merit, or value.

definitions: To enclose (an object) completely in any flexible, thin material such as fabric or paper.

definition: Great anger; (countable) an instance of this.

definitions: Something twisted, intertwined, or curled.

definitions: To take part in (a wrestling bout or match).

definitions: A person who wrestles.

definitions: A sport where two opponents attempt to subdue each other in bare-handed grappling using techniques of leverage, holding, and pressure points.
